title: Environment and climate
explanation:
Environment and climate

  • climate words: drought, flood, emissions, renewable energy, habitat
  • verbs: reduce, protect, recycle, conserve
  • phrases: carbon footprint, global warming

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: This region often suffers from summer ____ because it hardly rains. | *drought | flood | breeze
Factories are trying to reduce carbon ____. | *emissions | habitats | witnesses
questions.feedback: Emissions are gases released into the air.

questions.text: Solar and wind are forms of ____ energy. | *renewable | delayed | furnished
questions.feedback: Renewable energy can be replaced naturally.

questions.text: We should ____ natural habitats for wild animals. | *protect | broadcast | promote

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Heavy rain caused a serious ____ in the village. | flood
Riding a bike can lower your carbon ____. | footprint
National parks help ____ rare species. | conserve
Global ____ is changing weather patterns worldwide. | warming
Many birds lose their ____ when forests disappear. | habitat

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Try to ____ glass, paper and metal whenever possible. | *recycle | delay | resign
Air ____ can damage human health. | *pollution | promotion | qualification
We need to cut down on single-use ____. | *plastic | lecture | receipt
questions.feedback: Plastic waste is a major issue.

questions.text: A long ____ damaged farmers' crops this year. | *drought | storm | bargain
